programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dying his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Rick roll deeper into the Canadian outback, while a dangerous overflow may leave Alex stranded in the wilderness. Dave's training run with Tony reaches the boiling point. Lisa Kelly goes on a rescue mission.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dave's hot temper may cost him his second, and final shot to become an Ice Road Trucker . Maya fights to prove she belongs behind the wheel.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Rick are hauling the biggest load ever to travel up the Canadian ice roads! The record breaking journey spans three days and right out of the gate, Rick's amateur antics cause problems for the Convoy, which puts Hugh in the hot seat.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: While hauling loads north, the Ice Road Truckers hammer away at the weather, accident, and truck obstacles in their way. As Hugh and Rick deliver the largest load ever trucked on Manitoba's ice roads, their convoy comes to a sudden halt.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road Truckers face their greatest challenges to date. Lisa takes on the biggest haul of her career, and a huge promotion may be on the line. Maya is still stuck under Phil's wing and she's beginning to wonder if he'll ever let her make a solo run.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: It's halfway through the season and time to go old school. Down in the Bayou, Shelby's wild ride could end his season early. In the Pacific Northwest, Rygaard and Oakes compete in a no-holds-barred turf war.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In the Bayou, Shelby goes on the hunt for the thief who stole his boat. Up north in Washington, the battle between rivals explodes as Rygaard refuses to allow Oakes to pass through their landing. Down in Florida, Clint's boat nearly goes up in smoke.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Big noise and big toys turn the season upside down. In Alaska, a misstep by Joe cripples the yarder for Papac. In Washington, Gabe Rygaard pulls out a massive feller buncher.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In the Bayou, Shelby teaches his new puppy how to hunt for wood. On Snag Hill, the Rygaard crew breaks out their biggest weapon, but the increased production leads to total chaos.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor, so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful “Heart of Cybertron.”

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful "Heart of Cybertron."

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons and Insecticons team up to attack a defense base filled with data that Megatron wants to get his hands on. When the Insecticons connect with the base's energy shield, they unexpectedly grow larger…and potentially explosive!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun due to a plan by Megatron and human industrialist Sean Burger. With the Autobots gone, the Decepticons are free to do as they please.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack, and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power. Using a molecule-freezing device to take Megatron and Starscream out of the picture, the two are free to lead how they see fit.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Following an Indian attack on their stagecoach that kills his prisoner, Randall and an eastern gentleman unaccustomed to the ways of the West must trek to safety across many long, hot miles of hostile Apache territory.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: When a blight kills all the crops except for one farmer's, Paladin must protect him from a greedy storekeeper who wants his farm and his hired bodyguard who has a personal grudge against Paladin.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to find James Becker. He trails him to Monterey and discovers he has been arrested and is sentenced to work in a silver mine.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to bring in the killer of the sheriff in a Nevada town. He brings him in but has some doubts about his guilt and decides to hang around for the trial.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin agrees to capture an outlaw in return for a statue belonging to the local mission.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is forced to kill Jimmy Dawes, wanted for murder. When he takes him back to his hometown, the townspeople, the sheriff and the boy's brothers give him a hostile welcome.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Pappy French and his gang have robbed the bank in Mercede of $50,000. Pappy ran off with the cash and left his gang to shoot it out with the law. Paladin is hired to bring Pappy and the money back.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Chris Sorenson is shy around women and he asks Paladin to help him with his new neighbor, Senorita Maria de Castro, a lady rancher. Complicating the matter is cattle missing from the de Castro ranch.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Roy Carter is scheduled to be hanged. Another man confesses to the murder just before the execution is to take place. Paladin is hired to try to convince the warden to delay the hanging.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunman Nate Crandall murders a rancher to steal $20,000. Sheriff Hollister gets to the loot first and locks it in a safe. Determined to get the money, Crandall involves young Jim Edwards in a plot to rob the safe and take the fall for the killing.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Reverend Tuttle is aboard the stagecoach when it is robbed by three masked gunmen. Sheriff Hollister suspects Big Jim Sten, boss of a nearby town, is behind the robbery. But when the reverend and Hollister visit Sten's town, a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jett Sergeant, son of a notorious outlaw, sees Hollister kill his father in a shootout and vows he will kill the Sheriff. Clay tries to set him straight, but the youth teams up with two of his father's henchmen in a plot a murder the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Frank Leslie returns to Tombstone to marry the widow of the man he killed and pledges never to use guns again. But four brothers of Leslie's victim come to Tombstone intent on revenge, putting his oath to the test.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister and Claibourne journey to a neighboring town and find it evacuated in anticipation of the arrival of an outlaw band. Clay and the editor are captured and the leader of the marauders is killed as a new outlaw takes command.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister has to fire a young deputy for being 'trigger-happy.' The youngster takes a job as a guard in the Saloon, where he unnecessarily guns down a popular rancher, and when Hollister orders him out of town, the young man defies him.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A Mexican bandito, Augustine Ramirez, has been crossing the border into Tombstone Territory to prey on the ranchers and then retreating to Mexico, where international law protects him. Hollister goes undercover to infiltrate the bandit's lair.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Army Civilian Scout Bat Masterson (Gene Barry) nearly gets his neck stretched in an affair involving Colorado politics when he finds he needs to extricate himself from a capitol charge arising from a Major's ravenous political ambitions.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Bat arrives in Lordsbury to meet a friend, he changes his mind, making a 'different appointment,' instead. Three power-hungry ranchers and Lordsbury's top lawman have ganged up on Bat's friend and killed him.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The cry of 'Silver!' is heard again in Monument City, a ghost mining camp once the scene of a historic silver strike. Prospector Bat Masterson, who has an old claim, returns to Monument City to find he's road-blocked by Clay Adams and Harvey Mason.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson becomes a 'Pinkerton.' The famous detective agency baffled in their attempts to expose crime chieftain John Kelso enlists Bat to find evidence that will put Kelso behind bars permanently.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson nearly gets one tombstone more than he bargained for while en route to Tombstone, Arizona. Bat, bushwhacked by gunmen and left for dead, is found by Marshal Sam Phelps.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson takes on the job of guard and bouncer in El Paso's famed Royal Flush Saloon. The most frequent invaders of the Royal Flush are bandit raiders. Dodge City's famed Wyatt Earp makes himself handy in the ensuing fracas.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: It's a showdown at Jackson Hole when Bat Masterson ferrets out the men who murdered one of his friends. Dirty politics 'pork barrel' and two attempts on Bat's life make this a highly colorful episode in the life of the great Bat Masterson.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson is a gambler, empire-builder, Indian-fighter and journalist. He uses his derringer and gold-headed cane to win the justice he believes to be right.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Dora is forcing Kelly to sell his saloon so Albright and McGuire see an opportunity to not only buy it but to get rid of Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: As Jim Kelly and Dora Hand prepare to wed, Jim Rellance from Texas hopes to marry Dora. Dora tells him to find a younger girl and Earp tells him to leave Dodge City.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: With only three weeks left, and the top position on the line, every captain is desperate to stack the deck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: With less than two weeks left, the top four crews are locked in a tight race to be New England’s best boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It’s the final week of the season and Hard Merchandise holds a narrow lead over the fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: There are less than five days left, and the competition will come down to the very last day of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It’s the final week of the season and the competition is so close, it will come down to the very last day.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: The best fishermen from Gloucester set out on the first day of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Erin & Sarah, the father/daughter fishing operation, try to keep their lead over the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It’s week three of the season, and one captain is forced to choose between two friends on the water.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It’s week four and tensions start to boil for Wicked Pissah’s new crew, while two rival harpoon boats face off

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It’s week five of the tuna season and teamwork is the name of the game for Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Sharks, shorts and crew problems plague the fleet, but two captains get blessed with new mates.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Midway through the fishing season, a long-__running feud lands one captain in hot water.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: At the halfway mark of the tuna season, some teams are working well together while others are floundering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: The captains face a familiar decision: whether or not to take the long, high_risk journey to Georges Bank.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: After a massive haul at Georges Bank, two captains decide to double down and make the long trip again.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: When a violent storm rolls in, the captains face a tough decision at a critical time: do they fish… or flee?

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A big time producer wants to make iCarly into a TV show. But Carly, Sam, and Freddie are soon upset to learn all of the big changes the producer wishes to make.

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly learns that because of her web show she's been given the opportunity for a full scholarship to the elite private school, Briarwood. Carly's not so sure about it, but Sam and Freddie know they have to change her mind.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's in need of some guy time, so he tags along with Spencer to go fencing. Freddie's a natural, but things get complicated when Spencer gets him involved in a match with the amazing Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When their friend Gibby is too shy to ask out the girl he likes, the gang decides to make him and his crush contestants in an 'iWin A Date' segment on the web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Ackerman, the gang's teacher, goes through a rough breakup with her boyfriend, causing her to quarrel with her students. A visit from Spencer to sort out the dispute turns into a date.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly steps in to resolve an argument for Sam and Freddie. Soon Freddie and Sam are coming to Carly for help with every single fight. Now that she's involved, how can Carly remove herself?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Benson discovers Sam and Freddie's relationship after Gibby, now the subject of Sam's abuse, concocts a plan to split them up. Will Carly fight for Sam and Freddie, or help Gibby break them up?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tells Sam and Freddie to try each other's favorite hobbies. Meanwhile, Spencer bumps into his old babysitter and asks her to dinner. After reverting to their old roles, will they stay together?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tries to impress a new boyfriend by trying to look smarter than she is. Meanwhile, the gang tries to find T-Bo a new place to live after he gets kicked out of the Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A high-level government agency starts to inquire into the iCarly gang after they hack into a secure network to throw Carly's dad an online birthday party. *Guest Star - Michelle Obama

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets her toe stuck in a bathtub right before she is supposed to leave for a date. Meanwhile, Sam and the rest of the gang get trapped in Canada when she's caught trying to smuggle Fat Cakes over the border.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie wants to be recognized for his creative contributions to iCarly, so he comes up with a technology that allows people to see 3D webcasts without glasses. Unfortunately, it temporarily alters people's vision.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam opens a safe in her bedroom and discovers a tunnel leading to a secret room; Cat films herself for 24 hours.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat are hired to baby-sit a doll on Halloween; Cat thinks she may have turned Dice into a monkey.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: When Sam and Cat watch an accident-prone boy, they are determined to show him a good time while keeping him out of harm's way.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat plays a trick on Sam using a pair of twins that they are a babysitting; Sam retaliates with a prank on Cat.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat are ordered to rename their babysitting business because it is too similar to a television show from the 1970s.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat are tasked with getting a child to give up her ratty, old stuffed animal.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Gets Stuck
programme.desc: Tori Gets Stuck: Tori is excited when she gets cast as the lead in the school play, but she has to deal with her very unhappy understudy… Jade. Tori has to avoid Jade's constant sabotage so she can perform on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Tortures Teacher
programme.desc: The kids take Sikowitz to the theater to celebrate his ten-year teaching anniversary, but the play's subject sends Sikowitz into a deep depression. Tori must cheer him up.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Gets Crushed
programme.desc: Andre spends time with Jade working on a song and develops a crush on her. Tori tries to help him get over his crush, but nothing seems to work, and Andre has trouble keeping his feelings a secret.

programme.title: Victorious: Who Did it to Trina?
programme.desc: Trina stars in Tori's directorial debut, and there is a big accident on opening night. Lane wants to find out what went wrong. Everyone thinks it was an equipment malfunction, maybe it's sabotage.

programme.title: Victorious: Beggin' On Your Knees
programme.desc: Beggin' On Your Knees: The Full Moon Jam is coming up. The cutest boy in school wants to perform a duet with Tori, but she finds out he has a reputation. Is Tori just having trust issues, or is this guy bad news?

programme.title: Victorious: Ice Cream for Ke$ha
programme.desc: Tori has to be Trina's assistant for a month. The only way Trina will call off the bet is if Tori wins a private Ke$ha concert. Tori's friends try to save Tori and hopefully score a Ke$ha concert!

programme.title: Victorious: Prom Wrecker
programme.desc: Tori rallies the gang into having prom at Hollywood Arts, but the event ruins Jade's art project, and now she's out for revenge. Can Tori throw a successful prom, with Jade aiming to bring the whole dance down?

programme.title: Victorious: Terror on Cupcake Street
programme.desc: The kids have to build a float fast. They only have a night to drive the float to the parade. When the float breaks down in a bad neighborhood, can the kids recover and save their chance to be on TV?

programme.title: Victorious: A Christmas Tori
programme.desc: The kids have to find the perfect Secret Santa gifts for each other, because whoever gives the worst gift has to go door-to-door yodeling with Sikowitz!
